name: Chicken in the (Crock) Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and giblets and pat dry. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Sauté in butter until golden brown on all sides.
3. Transfer to crock pot. Rinse out drippings with water and pour into crock pot.
4. Place carrots, parsnips, celery, and green onions around the chicken.
5. Season vegetables with salt and pepper.
6. Add garlic, oregano, broth, and wine.
7. Cover pot. Cook on low for 8 hours or until tender.
8. Remove chicken and vegetables to a platter and keep warm.
9. Pour pan juices into saucepan. Skim fat. Reduce until reduced to 1 cup.
